item.name: Update card metadata profile by id
Get card metadata profile by id

request.description:
This HTTP GET request retrieves a list of clients from the admin panel at the specified endpoint. The request does not require any parameters to be passed in the request body.

### Request

- Method: GET
- Endpoint: `{{env}}/admin-panel/v1/clients`

### Response

The response will have a status code of 200, indicating a successful request. The body of the response will contain an array of client items, with each item including various details such as ID, name, type, status, onboarding verification state status, risk profile, sections, profitability assigned, support assigned, boarding assigned, creation and update timestamps, agreement signed date, approval date, confirmation status, internal status, unconfirmed details, time unconfirmed, and test client status. Additionally, the response will include pagination details such as limit, offset, and count.

Sample Response Body:
```json
{
    "items": [
        {
            "id": "",
            "name": "",
            "type": "",
            "status": "",
            "onboardingVerificationStateStatus": "",
            "riskProfile": null,
            "sections": [""],
            "profitabilityAssignedTo": null,
            "supportAssignedTo": null,
            "boardingAssignedTo": null,
            "createdAt": "",
            "updatedAt": "",
            "deletedAt": null,
            "agreementSignedAt": "",
            "approvedDate": "",
            "frozenBy": null,
            "frozenAt": null,
            "isConfirmed": true,
            "isInternal": true,
            "unconfirmed": [""],
            "timeUnconfirmed": 0,
            "isTestClient": true
        }
    ],
    "pagination": {
        "limit": 0,
        "offset": 0,
        "count": 0
    }
}
```

Additionally, the response will include pagination details such as limit, offset, and count.

Sample Response Body:

Code:

``` json
account_velocity_amounts

afd_usa_decline
black_list
card_activity_1_minutes
country_change_within_24h
first_auth_as_refund
high_cash_volume
high_number_of_declines
high_risk_country_decline_all
high_risk_country_decline_atm
high_risk_country_mark_suspicious
high_risk_mcc_purchase
high_risk_mcc_within_24_hours
invalid_pin
magnetic_stripe
magnetic_stripe_and_card_data_entered_manually
magnetic_stripe_on_chip_capable_terminal
not_enough_funds
reversal_refund
same_merchant_1_minutes
same_merchant_1_minutes_only_approved
same_merchant_24h 
within_1_minute 
wrong_cvv

 ```

Status:

```
1 - Freeze card
2 - Declined
3 - Suspicious
4 - Approved

 ```

Risk zone:

```
0 - Low
1 - Medium
2 - High

 ```

Triggered:

```
1 - Yes
0 - No

 ```
